title: Purple CPVP  16x
description: This Project adds new textures for alle the cpvp items in a black and purple look
body:
A Texture Pack made for CPVP and revamps all the pvp items in a purple color and gives them a brand new look the Pack contains Following things:
- Crossbow with Indicator
- Ender Pearl
- Low Fire
- Respawn Anchor
- Glowstone
- Snow Overlay
- Totem
- End Crystal
- Obsidian
- Glowstone Dust
- Hotbar
- Elytra
-
